title: nepeta subincisa
intro: Nepeta subincisa, also known as Nepeta, is a perennial herb native to China, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Nepeta subincisa include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
